scripts.db:migrate: for f in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do echo "-- $f"; psql -d crypto_spread_journal -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:drop && pnpm db:create && pnpm db:migrate
scripts.worker:dev: cd worker && uv run python -m csj_worker.main
scripts.worker:once: cd worker && uv run python -m csj_worker.main --once
scripts.worker:match: cd worker && uv run python -m csj_worker.main match
scripts.worker:backfill-excursions: cd worker && uv run python -m csj_worker.main backfill-excursions
scripts.electron:emit: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json || node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('electron/dist/main.js')){console.error('electron:emit produced no main.js — fix the type errors above');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm electron:emit && concurrently -k -n next,electron -c blue,magenta "next dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env DESKTOP_DEV=1 DESKTOP_DEV_PORT=3000 electron ."
scripts.electron:pack: pnpm electron:emit && next build && pnpm electron:prepare-standalone && electron-builder --dir --mac
scripts.electron:build: pnpm electron:emit && next build && pnpm electron:prepare-standalone && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: pnpm electron:emit && next build && pnpm electron:prepare-standalone && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:all: pnpm electron:emit && next build && pnpm electron:prepare-standalone && electron-builder --mac --win
scripts.release: if [ -f scripts/release.sh ]; then bash scripts/release.sh; else echo 'TODO — see electron/ scaffolding'; exit 1; fi
